pr.title: Record: Two-Pass Order-12 N-gram Backoff + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 0.1310 (3-seed)

output.summary: 11L parallel Muon transformer uses order-12 N-gram backoff cache built in pass one and rescoring cold chunks in pass two.
